headline.text: L1 Sollich 3 found *non-detectable metal* on Matrix 5 at 09:00 — line down, all product scrapped, visual inspection of full line underway at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Sollich 3 found a small piece of metal on Matrix 5 belt at 09:00 that neither the metal detector nor X-ray could detect; line stopped, all product scrapped, and floor is conducting a full visual inspection from C19 through end of line. Sollich 2 cleared an X-ray reject handling issue by adding trays to catch pouches and retraining operators.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 cleared six machine stops in the window — ML2 reheated a solidified chocolate line in 18 minutes, fixed a backwards nose piece, cleared a flow-wrap jam, replaced speed belt #3, and power-cycled a mold warmer. ML3 is running low on chocolate from L1 with about 2 hours of run time left in the melter at 09:44.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 cleared a misaligned mixing auger sensor in 19 minutes and unclogged 3 nozzles, but the Cavanna flow-wrap is still stopping intermittently on paper splits despite changing rolls and adjusting rollers. ML4 startup found a loose screw inside the north Sweco at 08:44, cleaned and inspected the area, and is monitoring a re-cleaned cream tank for odor; depositor #4 needs a re-clean.

resolved.title: X-ray reject pouches hitting floor, operators re-sending
resolved.summary: Pouches missing reject bin and hitting floor; operators were re-sending through X-ray against protocol.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:50 — trays and bins placed under X-ray reject to catch pouches, operators retrained on protocol (Victor Romero Sr., Mary Montilla).

resolved.title: Roof patching work left hole exposed
resolved.summary: Roofers working on roof left hole exposed over production area.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:55 — "Area is being taken care of right now" at 09:39, roofers patching holes (Katya Farnsworth, William Lopez).

resolved.title: ML2 chocolate line solidified from branch pump to depositor
resolved.summary: Chocolate pipe completely solid overnight; team reheated and unclogged.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:54 — "Pipe is unclogged. We are back tempering" in 18 minutes, depositing at 06:16 (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: ML2 cross conveyor not tracking, nose piece backwards
resolved.summary: Cross conveyor failed to track because nose piece was installed backwards.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:18 — "Line back up running" in 8 minutes (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML2 bars going sideways into flow-wrap causing jams
resolved.summary: Bars entering FW at wrong angle, jamming the wrapper; maintenance on-site.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:36 — maintenance tightened drive side belt, "Line is back up" in 6 minutes (Alex Mendoza, Dave Ruff).

resolved.title: ML2 belt rubbing causing film
resolved.summary: One of the speed belts was rubbing on something, causing film buildup; maintenance investigating.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 08:48 — maintenance replaced speed belt #3, line back up (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: ML3 waiting for chocolate delivery from L1
resolved.summary: Line ready but waiting for chocolate to be brought over from L1 warehouse.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:26 — chocolate staged by warehouse, depositing at 06:13 (Joey Michael Dudney, Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: ML2 mold temperature controller stopped heating
resolved.summary: Mold warmer controller stopped heating molds mid-run.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:36 — power-cycled mold warmer, "It has corrected itself with the power down," line running (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: ML2 clean-in-line downtime
resolved.summary: Scheduled CIL took line down mid-shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:53 — "Line is back up" after 24 minutes (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: Mixing auger sensor not reading
resolved.summary: Sensor failed to read; maintenance found it was misaligned and corrected it on-site.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:52 — sensor realigned, "it wasn't all the way aligned. It's on now" (Rich Brierley).

resolved.title: North Sweco loose screw/metal found inside
resolved.summary: Sweco made noise on startup; disassembled, found loose piece inside, area inspected and cleared by QA.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:44 — area inspected, no metal residues found, production cleaned to ensure no foreign material (Mirella Mamani).

resolved.title: 3 clogged nozzles on ML1
resolved.summary: Three depositor nozzles clogged during run; cleared by hand on-shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:58 — "The nozzles have already been unclogged" (Grey Boscan).

needs_attention.title: Non-detectable metal found on Sollich 3 Matrix 5 belt
needs_attention.summary: Small piece of metal found on belt C26 at Matrix 5; passed through both metal detector and X-ray undetected; line stopped, all product scrapped, full visual inspection of belts and matrices underway.
needs_attention.status: Line down as of 09:35, visual inspection with flashlights from C19 through X-ray in progress, all product scrapped, tunnel 2 filters checked and clear as of 10:32.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 bowed guarding hitting on every lug
needs_attention.summary: Guarding bolts over-tightened with tools instead of hand-tight; bowed guarding now hitting lugs on every rotation.
needs_attention.status: Plan to remove all guarding so maintenance can fix bowed sections; raised at 08:59, no update by window close.

needs_attention.title: Curtain not sealed at production boundary
needs_attention.summary: Environmental curtain between production zones not properly sealed.
needs_attention.status: Raised at 10:09, Justin committed to fix at 10:26.

needs_attention.title: ML3 running low on chocolate, 2 hours left
needs_attention.summary: All available chocolate on the line is in the melter; approximately 2 hours of run time remaining as of 09:44.
needs_attention.status: Alan Todd instructed at 10:27 to leave 10% in buffer tank to avoid reheat if supply runs out.

needs_attention.title: ML4 cream tank odor monitoring after re-clean
needs_attention.summary: Cream tank re-cleaned at 08:52, left with lid open to air out and monitor for lingering odor.
needs_attention.status: Re-cleaned at 09:40, lids left open for natural air circulation, monitoring smell as of window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Cavanna flow-wrap paper splitting intermittently
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna wrapper stopping frequently as paper keeps splitting open; maintenance adjusting rollers and changing roll sides.
needs_attention.status: Nathan Ruiz on-site since 09:48, ran better at 09:55, paper opened again at 10:28, changed roll side and adjusting rollers as of window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 depositor #4 needs re-clean
needs_attention.summary: Depositor #4 failed QA inspection during startup prep; 3rd shift cleaned it last week.
needs_attention.status: Raised at 10:13, team identified 3rd shift as original cleaners, no ETA on re-clean by window close.
